properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 45/16
ANDØYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT MISSILE FIRINGS IN THE AREA NORTH OF,  AND INSIDE ANDFJORDEN, IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM MAY 23 TO JUNE 6 2016.  THE MISSILE FIRINGS WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 22:00 AND 05:00 LOCAL TIME  IN THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD. 
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF, AND STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA DURING THE ANNOUNCED PERIODS.

DANGER AREA: 
THE  FOLLOWING COORDINATES SHOWS A SIMPLIFIED DANGER AREA, WHERE THE SEA  AREAS WITHIN THE COORDINATES FORM THE REAL DANGER AREA. COMPLETE LIST OF  COORDINATES AND MAP WILL BE PUBLISHED ON WWW.TESTCENTER.NO 
A. N69-49.77 E016-42.44 
B. N68-59.38 E015-41.57 
C. N68-49.14 E015-54.25 
D. N69-04.17E016-42.68 
E. N69-39.13 E017-35.69 
F. N69-49.77 E016-42.44 

IN ADDITION, THERE WILL BE SHIPS ANCHORED ON THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS: 
A. N69-31.7 E016°47.4
B. N69-30.9 E016°42.4 
C. N69-30.7 E016°40.4 
D. N68-58.3 E015°50.3 
E. N68-58.6 E015°52.8 

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 09/16
